note: Canonical lesson map for the production run. code = WC-<module>-<lesson>. planHeading = heading to Grep in WC-technician-learning-plan-v1.0.md. pages = primary demo URLs. walk = interactions the authoring walk must cover (allowlist-safe).

lessons.title: Workstation prerequisites
lessons.walk: none — doc-only lesson (no video, no live walk; guide only, no shot list or narration)

lessons.title: Signing in
lessons.walk: Observe login page anatomy only (logo, marketing panel, three fields, Show password eye, Remember me, Forgot password?, Sign In →). DO NOT type into fields. Note the demo Quick-access button exists as a demo-tenant-only entry (document in Notes as demo artifact, not the taught flow). Then via #qa-btn confirm landing page and avatar initials. Teach three-field flow with masked values.

lessons.title: Account menu & personal setup
lessons.planHeading: Lesson 0.3 — The account menu and personal setup
lessons.walk: Click avatar (top-right initials) to open account menu; digest items (Profile, My Training, Notifications, Preferences, Dark Mode, Help Center, Logout); toggle Dark Mode on AND back off; open My Training → confirm lms-home.html loads; do NOT click Logout.

lessons.title: Session behavior & timeouts
lessons.walk: Digest settings-user-levels.html table (NAME / SECURITY LEVEL / SESSION TIMEOUT (MIN) rows). The idle 'Still there?' dialog appears after inactivity — if you see it live, screenshot BEFORE dismissing; note its exact text, countdown, buttons. Do not wait for it artificially beyond ~3 min; the July 9 sweep already captured it on command-center (verification/2026-07-09/digests/command-center.json). Firing thresholds remain parked #9.

lessons.title: List conventions
lessons.walk: On Customer List: digest KPI strip, insight cards, search placeholder, Filters ▾ (open, read Clear all/Apply Filters, close), column headers, pagination control labels (ROWS PER PAGE options, counter). Cross-check one more list (Gift Cards) to show the pattern generalizes.

lessons.title: Universal record pattern
lessons.planHeading: Lesson 1.5 — Interface conventions: the universal record pattern
lessons.walk: Open Cancellation Reasons list; open one record's detail (row click); note View buttons (← Back, Delete variant, Edit variant); open the Edit form; change NOTHING; leave via Cancel; document + New button opens blank form (open, Cancel). Note the fixed-sample-record demo quirk if observed.

lessons.title: Command Center deep dive
lessons.walk: Digest all panels top to bottom (Mobile App engagement, Location Network map + KPI cards + Full USA/Active States toggle, Priority Intelligence severity groups + row affordances, Action Ownership lanes, Ask MAIA panel). Click Full USA / Active States toggle (view-only). Do NOT click Launch/Target/Recover/Assign action rows; Open →/Review →/View → deep-links MAY be followed read-only to name the landing page, then go back.

lessons.title: Customer List
lessons.walk: KPI strip, insight cards, list card title, search placeholder, Filters ▾ open/close, buttons (Retention Log, Delete, + Add Customer), columns, STATUS chips, pagination. Open Retention Log (read-only page/panel), describe, return. Type a name fragment in search to show filtering; clear it.

lessons.title: Customer 360 (9 tabs)
lessons.walk: Open a customer row → Customer 360. Digest header band, chips, buttons, metric band, Related chips, all NINE tabs one by one (Overview, Contact, Membership, Payments, Vehicles, Linked Accounts, Activity, Messaging, Notes) — screenshot each tab. Open Actions ▾ to LIST its items (Issue Wash, Refund Customer per July 8) — close without clicking either. NEVER send anything on Messaging tab. Part split: Part 1 = header + tabs 1–5, Part 2 = tabs 6–9 + Actions ▾ + recap.

lessons.title: Edit / New Customer
lessons.planHeading: Lesson 2.3 — Edit Customer / New Customer forms
lessons.walk: From Customer 360 click Edit Customer; digest edit tabs (differ from view tabs) and Contact fields; change NOTHING; Cancel. Note demo quirk (fixed sample record) if observed. + Add Customer → blank form digest → Cancel.

lessons.title: Gift Cards
lessons.walk: KPIs, insights, buttons (Delete, + Issue Gift Card — never click Issue), columns. Search a card number visible in the list; read balance/status/last used from the row.

lessons.title: House Accounts + detail
lessons.walk: List KPIs/insights/buttons/columns (locate Generate Invoices — never click). Open an account detail: header, chips, buttons, metric band, Related chips, all TEN tabs (screenshot Overview, Invoices, Payments at minimum; digest all tab names). AR Aging panel labels.

lessons.title: Prepaid Books · Vehicles · Retail · Bundles
lessons.planHeading: Lesson 2.6 — Prepaid Books, Vehicles, Retail Customers, Bundles
lessons.walk: Digest each list's columns + KPIs. Confirm CRM sidebar's Fundraiser entry is a stub (inspect href without clicking, or click and confirm nothing happens). Exact page filenames may differ — discover via CRM sidebar links.

lessons.title: Agent Console (Service Desk)
lessons.walk: Digest three panes: Handoff Queue (search placeholder, Mine/Unassigned/Team, channel filters All/Voice/SMS/Web, sort options), center empty state, Customer context panel, presence selector (Available/Away/Busy/Offline — open list, do not change if it persists; if a simple dropdown, note options and close).

lessons.title: Tickets list
lessons.walk: Header (TRANSACTIONS), KPIs, insights (By Status values), SEARCH TICKETS card, list columns, Export button located (never click). Sidebar inventory of Sales pages.

lessons.title: Ticket View
lessons.walk: Click a ticket row → sales-ticket-view.html?ticket=… (capture the deep-link URL pattern). Digest header, buttons (← Back to Tickets, red Refund — NEVER click), metric band, all FIVE tabs (Main, Details, Payments, Refunds, Notes) — screenshot Main + Refunds. Main section groups. Refunds empty-state text.

lessons.title: Payments · Payouts · Shifts · Declined log · GC/HA transactions
lessons.planHeading: Lesson 3.3 — The rest of the Transactions menu
lessons.walk: Digest each page: purpose line, KPIs, columns. Menu-level lesson — list/landing views only.

lessons.title: Inventory items + detail
lessons.walk: List KPIs/insights/buttons/columns. Open an item row → detail: buttons, THREE tabs (Item Details, Pricing & Stock, Storage & Location) — digest each tab's fields.

lessons.title: Batches · Adjustments · Vendors · Chemicals · POs
lessons.planHeading: Lesson 4.2 — Batches, Adjustments, Vendors, Chemicals, Purchase Orders
lessons.walk: Digest each list page: columns + KPIs. Menu-level lesson.

lessons.title: Campaigns
lessons.walk: KPIs, insights, list columns, statuses incl. any '⛅ Weather paused' chip (screenshot if present). NEVER activate/launch anything. + New Record may be opened to view the blank form then Cancel ONLY if it opens a form (not a send flow); skip if ambiguous.

lessons.title: Automation
lessons.walk: KPIs, Top Triggers donut labels, columns, trigger names, status chips. Read-only; never toggle Published/Draft. Discover exact filename from Marketing sidebar.

lessons.title: Rest of Marketing menu
lessons.walk: From Marketing sidebar, visit each page (SmartLinks, Customer Segments, Offers & Promotions, Email Templates, Paid Media (DRAFT), Deliverability, Referral Program, SMS Templates, RCS Templates, Mobile Content Blocks, Push Campaigns): digest title + one-line purpose + key columns. Menu-level lesson; never send/compose.

lessons.title: Executive Dashboard
lessons.walk: Digest header, period toggles (click through Today/Week/Month/Quarter/YTD/1Y — view-only), KPI cards, panels. Screenshot default + one alternate period.

lessons.title: Analytics sidebar (22 pages) + Forecasting
lessons.walk: Inventory the Analytics sidebar groups/pages from the live sidebar; visit 4–6 representative pages (incl. Downsells, BI Overview) + Forecasting (KPIs, forecast list columns). Digest names of all 22 pages.

lessons.title: Employees + detail
lessons.walk: List KPIs/insights/buttons/columns. Open an employee row → detail: header, metric band, SEVEN tabs (digest each; screenshot Overview). Never edit.

lessons.title: Schedules · Time Clock · Roles · User Groups
lessons.planHeading: Lesson 7.2 — Schedules, Time Clock, Roles, User Groups
lessons.walk: Digest each: Schedules weekly grid columns + shift codes; Time Clock KPIs/columns incl. live '—' punch; Roles and User Groups lists.

lessons.title: Sales Coaching (QA)
lessons.walk: QA Dashboard KPIs + panels + checkpoint labels; Scoring Scripts and Conversations list level.

lessons.title: Gamification
lessons.walk: Challenge Board KPIs, tabs (Active/All/Completed — click through, view-only), card anatomy; sibling pages at list level. Never click + New Challenge → Save.

lessons.title: Maintenance Issues
lessons.walk: KPIs, insights, + New Issue located (open blank form to document layout, then Cancel), columns, real example rows.

lessons.title: Schedule · Equipment · Checklists · Parts
lessons.planHeading: Lesson 8.2 — Maintenance Schedule, Equipment Registry, Checklists, Parts & Supplies
lessons.walk: Digest each page at menu/list level.

lessons.title: Incident Reports (5 types)
lessons.walk: List anatomy, columns, the five report types with numbering prefixes (from rows), statuses. Open + New Report ONLY to list the type choices, then Cancel/close.

lessons.title: Appointment Scheduling
lessons.walk: Appointments KPIs/insights/columns + List/Calendar toggle (click both views). Sibling pages digest at menu level. Never send via sched-messaging.

lessons.title: Portal pages
lessons.walk: Digest each page: KPIs + columns. Never send messages/notifications.

lessons.title: Mobile app pages + preview
lessons.walk: Digest each. If Settings → Mobile App exposes 'Open Mobile App Preview', open it read-only, screenshot, close the preview tab/window. Never send push.

lessons.title: ML Command Center (NOC)
lessons.walk: Header, scope filters (click All Customers/Enterprise/General — view-only), VIEWS (click through), KPI band, map, incident feed anatomy. Do NOT assign/claim incidents.

lessons.title: Support Tickets
lessons.walk: KPIs, category donut, columns, example rows. + New Record blank form layout then Cancel.

lessons.title: Help Desk (Zoho)
lessons.walk: Digest the not-connected empty state verbatim, mode chips, filters, buttons. Do NOT click Go to Zoho Desk Settings' Test Connection later — view only.

lessons.title: System Alerts
lessons.walk: KPIs, severity split, columns, alert-type examples from rows.

lessons.title: Knowledge Base + Training Requests
lessons.planHeading: Lesson 10.5 — Knowledge Base and Training Requests
lessons.walk: Digest both: KPIs, categories, columns, seed article titles / request anatomy.

lessons.title: Site Detail (Demo)
lessons.walk: FIRST WALK EVER (resolves parked #13): full read-only walk — header, tabs, panels, all labels. If the page 404s or is a stub, report and author nothing beyond a parked stub note.

lessons.title: Usage & Billing
lessons.walk: Header period line, KPI band, all SIX tabs (click each: Overview, SMS Usage, Email Usage, Invoices, Rate Card, Spending Alerts) — digest + screenshot Overview and Invoices. Never click Export CSV.

lessons.title: General & org structure
lessons.walk: Settings home (16 categories · 92 pages counter, search, cards) + digest each General page read-only. NEVER modify any setting.

lessons.title: Locations (5-tab detail incl. credentials)
lessons.walk: Locations list columns. Open a location detail: FIVE tabs (Profile, Operations, Payments & Credentials, Messaging, Users) — digest each; on Payments & Credentials name gateway blocks; NEVER copy even masked values into artifacts beyond block names (OPENEDGE, SMARTTECH, OTHER, CARDCONNECT). Never edit. Part split: Part 1 = list + Profile + Operations, Part 2 = Payments & Credentials + Messaging + Users + sibling pages.

lessons.title: Services & per-location values
lessons.walk: Services list; open a WASH service detail (two tabs: Service Main, Active Locations) — digest all field groups; open Edit Service to locate the per-location gear buttons (tooltip 'Configure per location'); try clicking ONE gear — the dialog is expected NOT to open (parked #1; confirm and report current behavior); Cancel out. Never save.

lessons.title: Payments & Finance
lessons.walk: Digest each at list level; open ONE Discount detail read-only (Active Locations pattern). Never edit.

lessons.title: Hardware & UI/Display
lessons.walk: Digest each at list level. LogicPOS pages are expected 404 (parked #2) — verify current status of logicpos/sales.html and report; do not author around it.

lessons.title: Users & Security
lessons.walk: Digest all four: System Users columns (incl. SSO, LAST LOGIN), User Levels full table values, Security Levels full table (REFUND APPROVAL REQUIRED per level), Blacklisted list. READ-ONLY absolute — never touch any row.

lessons.title: Operations reasons + Automation/Task Scheduler
lessons.walk: Digest each; Task Scheduler columns + observed job rows. NEVER modify the scheduler or run a task.

lessons.title: Customer Portal + AI Agent
lessons.walk: Portal hub + 4 subpages read-only (NEVER Publish Changes; Preview Portal may be opened read-only + screenshot + close). AI Agent overview + subpages read-only. Part split: Part 1 = Portal, Part 2 = AI Agent.

lessons.title: Integrations (SSO/accounting/Zoho)
lessons.walk: Zoho page deep (status banner, chips, buttons — NEVER Test Connection —, tiles, tabs Settings/Instructions, field groups); others at anatomy level. Never enter/edit credentials.

lessons.title: Reports hub + Report Viewer
lessons.walk: Hub: VIEWS list with counts, 19 category filters, list columns, Schedule Report located (never click). Open one report ('Daily, Period, and Shift Financial' if present) → Report Viewer: filter bar labels; click ▶ Run Report (read-only render, allowed); read the 'Generated … · Sample data' stamp; ✕ Close Report.

lessons.title: Audit trio
lessons.walk: Digest all three: KPIs, action-type splits, columns; find a Deleted action row and a price-change row (old/new values) as examples.

lessons.title: Academy learner side
lessons.walk: Digest each learner page: dashboard tiles, catalog card anatomy + filters, learning-path cards. Do NOT enroll/start courses.

lessons.title: Academy admin side
lessons.walk: FIRST WALK EVER (curriculum status Planned): digest all four admin pages read-only. Never enroll users or edit courses.

lessons.title: Migration (Jira CSI / Admin Portal)
lessons.walk: none — doc-sourced lesson. ALL facts from the Migration FAQ, attributed, per the plan's Lesson 15.1. No live UI claims. Shot list = slide/document-over narration (title cards), not platform recording.

lessons.title: Parity conversations
lessons.walk: none — doc-sourced from Features doc (attributed) + live restructure map (cite DISCREPANCIES #2–#23 as the project's own verified map). Same title-card shot list format as 15.1.

lessons.title: PB-1 Login failures
lessons.walk: Verify each check's page exists + the columns the playbook reads (ACTIVE, SSO, LAST LOGIN; failed logins). No password reset is performed.

lessons.title: PB-2 Surprise logouts / frozen session
lessons.walk: Verify USER LEVEL column and SESSION TIMEOUT (MIN) values live.

lessons.title: PB-3 POS down / terminal offline
lessons.walk: Verify each step's surface: Priority Intelligence POS row + deep link target, NOC incident feed, POS-type alerts, terminals list, tickets filter.

lessons.title: PB-4 Payment declines / auto-recharge failures
lessons.walk: Verify: Decline Rate KPI, Customer 360 Membership fields (LAST PAYMENT RESULT, NEXT CHARGE), Declined log columns, location Payments & Credentials block names, Usage by Source. Never modify.

lessons.title: PB-5 Settlement variance (reconciliation)
lessons.walk: Verify batch columns + statuses; locate Resolve batch control (never click). Refund execution remains parked #5.

lessons.title: PB-6 Tag/plate won't scan
lessons.walk: Verify: Membership tab BARCODE field, Vehicles tab + chips, master vehicle list columns, Blacklisted page, alert types.

lessons.title: PB-7 Membership change requests
lessons.walk: Verify Actions ▾ items (list only, never click), Security Levels table, Refund Reasons list, Notes tab controls.

lessons.title: PB-8 Campaign/automation stopped sending
lessons.walk: Verify status chips incl. weather-paused, Deliverability page, scheduler job rows, Mass SMS Log, Spending Alerts tab.

lessons.title: PB-9 Reports wrong/missing
lessons.walk: Verify Report Viewer filter bar, Scheduled Reports view, scheduler's report job.

lessons.title: PB-10 Portal/mobile can't log in
lessons.walk: Verify portal hub status/URL/Preview, Access & Security fields, portal activity feed, Mobile App Users columns.

lessons.title: PB-11 Who changed this?
lessons.walk: Verify Change History columns (FIELD/OLD/NEW), Audit Log columns (incl. IP ADDRESS).

lessons.title: PB-12 AI agent misbehaving
lessons.walk: Verify each surface read-only; never send test prompts (parked #8).

lessons.title: PB-13 Integration down
lessons.walk: Verify status banner, Test Connection button located (NEVER click), TOKEN EXPIRY field label, Help Desk empty state, SSO column.

lessons.title: PB-14 Broken page / 404 inside the platform
lessons.walk: Reproduce the real 404 (logicpos/sales.html) + the Fundraiser '#' stub; screenshot the 404 page; verify current status (may have changed since July 8 — report either way).

lessons.title: Written exam + 10-task practical
lessons.walk: none — doc-only. Author the 25-question written exam (drawn from the plan's knowledge checks; include answer key citing the lesson) + the 10-task practical checkout matrix as a proctor guide. Guide only; no shot list or narration.
